Full_Review: The staff at Maison Albar were friendly and welcoming Upon arrival we received an upgrade to a beautiful suite which was fabulous with wonderful city views Felix from the bar looked after us very well always ensuring our glasses were topped up

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: There wasn t anything I didn t like  Loved the location Next to an underground station Restaurants and cafe so close Hotel breakfast was good and bed and pillows were very comfortable also the bathroom was well appointed and lit

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Nothing could have been better   The staff were fabulous warm welcome when we arrived at the hotel where someone showed us to our room helped us with many other things such as helping us planning the day to the Eiffel Tower The room was really clean and the bed was really comfy

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The room was a bit small for a Junior suite The mini bar was so expensive I was able to buy 6 bottles at the market nearby for the price of one at the hotel  Great shower comfortable bed good food and coffee shops next door very close to metro good selection of music channels on TV friendly service very good decor the wifi worked at a good speed

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Had to stay an extra night and regular rates were much higher than Booking com rates   This was a familiar location for us Good restaurants nearby Hotel breakfast was good and had a very good selection including American breakfast items Trains and Metro within a block of hotel from which one can get virtually anywhere The room was very nice indeed the bathroom was fabulous and it had great TV with many English channels Staff was amazing Will stay here again if opportunity presents

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Not inexpensive but for this standard in Paris to be expected   Very modern restoration of a grand building of 1923 Excellent facilities in every respect Staff were friendly and courteous No complaints over anything The atmosphere was of peace and calm efficiency

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The staff were extremely friendly and helpful The room itself was quite spacious and comfortable The area around the hotel is quite busy and lively

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Only problem we encountered was that there were three of us in suite All toiletries and towels were laid out for three but the mugs and amount of coffee tea etc was only laid out for two Reception and housekeeping staff were always ready to supply extra of the above on request A small complaint which in no way affected the enjoyment of our stay   Hotel and suite were spotlessly clean Suite was extremely comfortable as were all other areas of the hotel All staff were extremely helpful and polite

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: It was the second time I stayed at this place and for the second time we had an issue with warm water Last time the boiler was down and we only had cold water but we expected it to be a one time issue This time there was warm water but it was only warm lukewarm I like to take a hot shower to relax muscles after walking around the whole day in Paris but it seems that the boiler can t manage to produce enough hot water for everyone   The location of the hotel is quite good being close to the department stores Printemps etc The rooms are stylish and well equipped even with a coffee machine

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Breakfast was not that good if compared to the price must be good The price is very high and does not fit the location  Good hotel and good clean so well from center to hotel

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Quicker service waited quite some time when requesting items   Abit delayed when requesting milk Water from shower head not always hot the hand shower only had very hot water the settings on toilet didn t work the music in shower very limited to 6 songs price abit steep but overall lovely room with lovely location I will return

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Upon arriving they said to me at the reception desk that they should have to charge in advance my credit card for 50 euros extra per day just in case that I get a service without pay They also said that my credit card will not be charged if I will not use the amount I found this insulting and unproffessional After all I booked a prepaid bed and breakfast accomodation just to be sure that I didn t have to pay anything extra Not to mention that after this treatment even if I wanted to buy anything at all the last thing I should do is to give the hotel even a single cent extra I would rather go a mile away and get it outside from the hotel   The location is perfect Staff very helpful The hotel in general is excellent

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: N A  The staff was very knowledgeable and extremely helpful with the planning of our site seeing They were kind and welcoming from the moment we walked in all the way until we left Going forward I will always stay at this hotel when I come to Paris Excellent location walking distance to several stations great food and restaurants open late right around the corner huge shopping venue nearby plus the room was perfection

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The lady serving us at breakfast was very unfriendly unhelpful and mostly in a bad mood and being exposed to her early in the day wasn t a great start to a moring on vacation Even though the food itself was lovely we opted to eat breakfast somewhere else on the days that she served breakfast   For Paris the rooms are extra large the bed and linen was super comfortable and we loved the Japanese toilet in the modernly decorated bathroom Our room had a good view too I would absolutely recommend this hotel to loved ones

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: No iron and ironing board in the room as when we have to rush for customer meetings this saves time as hotel laundry will be too slow   Clean comfortable and spacious for a European hotel

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The room was smaller than expected as we got an executive suite and it didn t seem much bigger than a double room Still amazingly decorated room and balcony   The staff were lovely and the decor was amazing Loved the location as it was close to everything by cab and even somethings walking distance

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: We were given the key to a room already occupied and our key opened the door to a room already with someone else s possessions in there This was fixed by giving us another room unoccupied But later the same thing happened us when someone was given a key to our room Bad organisation from staff  Like the decor and location was really good

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The only thing we didn t like twas the cocktail we had on the Saturday night wasn t great to be fair  Over all the hotel was excellent and wish I stay there another night

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Apple TV did not work and we also had to connect to the wifi from another room which didn t bother us but was strange Would have liked to try the hotel restaurant but it was just too expensive   This hotel is beautiful a real treat The staff were very friendly and made the whole check in process very smooth The room was very comfortable and clean and it was always a perfect temperature The staff were also very responsive when a mistake was made and worked very quickly to resolve it

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Very small room No Airconditioning no fan Room was terribly hot staff was not helpful at all The location is very busy and it s right next to the train station   It was nicely decorated

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The fact the concierge asked for a tip with his hand and also walked my girlfriend out the hotel around the corner and asked her to change English money for euros and tried to con her for extra That is not 5 star Also the hotel said there would be flowers in the room as requested but there were non yet still charged These two experiences dampened the stay a little  The reception staff were helpful and the location was fantastic for getting around Paris The hotel was clean and quiet The room was great and bed very comfy

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: On the second night of my stay at the Hotel the alarm went off in the hotel at around midnight all guests had to leave their rooms in complete darkness as the electricity switches had tripped Ran in the dark with our pj s to the foyer as we thought the hotel was burning or even worse maybe a terrorist attack Waited a whole hour and a half in the cold and dark before we were told that the smoke signal went off and that had triggerred the alarm and cut off the electricity supply Only one hotel staff member was on duty to assist which he was unable to do We were locked out of our rooms We only got back to our rooms at 1 30 All we were told was that they were sorry no compensation or even a written apology from the hotel management Quiet scary as the guy on duty did not have the situation under control No proper disaster management protocols are put into place PATHETIC FOR 5 STAR Wonder how and who rates you 5 star

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The service is not as good as it used to be before the rebrand Many of the original front of house staff who were extremely friendly and helpful have gone unfortunately Also the staff seem unaware of the booking com payment policies   Location is great and size of the rooms is good compared to other hotels in Paris They ve also upgraded the general facilities as a result of the recent refurbishment

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Limited TV channels The fire alarm went off in the middle of the night the electricity shut off and all guests were in reception until the early hours There was no communication from the staff and no one was aware that it was safe to return to the room Day staff were very unapologetic upon check out  Great location Beautiful hotel

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Lovely hotel with friendly and helpful staff Opposite the metro and near shops cafes restaurants Good location to explore the sights Even has an M S Food next door

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Bed and pillow   Staying at level 2 without Aircon and have to open the window and sleep is a pain check out early morning 6am and the staff doesn t know their system well and took 30mins for check out and can t release the deposit immediately upon check in the staff didn t inform us about city tax we only know when we upon check out we didnt go for any alcohol at bar service and the staff wanna charge us for that they waived off after a long dispute and pillow is terrible

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The Wifi was not so good It kept breaking down and the room was facing the street which was noisy but that is part of the Paris atmosphere Due to the location and busy street you need to call the taxi at least 15 mins before you need to leave   I absolutely loved the property The cleanliness the decor the location the friendly staff and service esp Tariq the bell boy The ambience was great I just did not realise that the hotel had a fitness room Next time I will try it I really loved my stay and I will definitely be back I only managed to have the breakfast on one day but it was perfect In terms of comfort cleanliness design decor location service this really is one of my favourite hotels and I have traveled around the world

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: We asked for help from the reception to recommend a restaurant for dinner however she never get back to us A bit disappointed   Great location English speaking staffs make things enjoyable Next to the station pharmacy and lots of restaurants Wifi is only available for 2 login so if you need to work on extra devices considering there 2 of you in the room there will be a problem

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The deco of the lobby looks like a night club  Loved the hotel amazing location Very clean and most of the staff members were very helpful Maybe the d cor could be more classy and the rooms are spacious compared to other hotels in Paris

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Lighting in the halls and rooms wasn t great Could do with better lighting   Bed was super comfy and staff were very helpful when we needed it split into a double

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: They need another elevator Sometimes the elevator was held up and I had to take the stairs to the 5th floor   The hotel was totally BEAUTIFUL I loved it The staff was excellent They had amazing breakfast My room was so GORGEOUS

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The service is poor Housekeeping services sucks They forgot to give us bath towels didnt clean the room properly Housekeeping kept knocking on the doors in the mornings although the please do not disturb sign on was placed on   Bed and room was comfortable

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: not much maybe Lobby area decoration a bit overloaded   corner room new 2016 design was just amazing I could overlook the whole place in front of Gare St Lazare steam bath built within the shower as special highlight huge room all nice and modern with nespresso machine Room was an upgrade however great breakfast with huge selection and fresh juices

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The only downside we would like to point out is the room temperature The room was a bit cold during our stay   We were upgraded to a deluxe room and it seems that it has only slight differences from a standard The bathroom is really great nice spacious shower The room is also spacious for Paris standards The hotel is located next to Gare Saint Lazare which gives you an awesome position to use metro and move around town We will definitely come back to this hotel

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The only thing that I can comment on the location though it s not that far from the main attraction places   Every detail at this boutique hotel is looked after carefully and this makes everything in it a great experience

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Can t fault a thing so pleased with everything Best hotel in Paris highly highly recommend   The whole hotel experience was amazing best hotel we ve ever stayed in and we ve stayed in some lovely ones Chic glamorous and amazing attention to detail from a lovely email offering us to drop our bags off early and they d have our room ready as early as possible The bathroom sound system and mood lighting in the bathroom has the wow factor The bed was unbelievable and the staff were so warm and welcoming they couldn t do ebough for you The cleanliness was second to non Amazing value for money made our stay in Paris so special would highly highly recommend to anyone I would also 100 stay here again Amazing experience Loveliest hotel I ve ever stayed in

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Aircon not working so became very hot in the room even in December   Great location Friendly multilingual staff Spacious room Great wet room bathroom Very peaceful

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Coffeepot is broken in my room   Nice cleanliness good location And I love the hotel manager in night lobby I m deeply inpressed with your kindness Thank you very much

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: There was no gym despite being advertised as part of the hotel s facilities which I found out on the day   Friendly excellent service central location coffee in the room

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Our room was stuffy The room was very noisy all night as it fronted the street and we needed to open the windows   Good sized very clean room Big comfortable bed and pillows Windows that opened Good value

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: There was supposed to be evening entertainment but we saw none Bar closed on Sunday   We were on the 3rd floor at the front the soundproofing was so good we heard very little noise The Lazare train station beside the hotel contains super shops and an excellent restaurant Loved the room and the bath room was beautiful and so well equipped even a very elaborate toilet the operation of which we stayed well clear of Would love to revisit

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Room could of been a touch bigger the hot breakfast was cold and space when I visited  The comfort of the bed the shower and the staff were very accommodating and helpfull

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Nothing   I loved my stay at this lovely hotel The location was superb awesome cafes and restaurants are nearby Also the train station is very close as well The area around the hotel is lively during the day I actually went to the champs elysees by walking for almost 25 minutes which was not so bad As for the room i had the double one which was perfect for us as a couple The furniture is elegant and the bed was very comfortable As for the bathroom it was the best part of the experience because it was very clean modern and had an awesome walk in shower The water pressure was so good as well It deserves to be a 5 stars hotel and the hotel management are actually doing some renovations to make that happen I for one was not annoyed by the renovation works Ask for a room that is besides the court yard for the quietness and peacefulness I will surely book again if i come to Paris for another trip Oh and yes the staff are nice and very helpful when needed

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Construction outside the room we had to step over workers to get in and out of our room   The front desk staff are excellent friendly and very helpful

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Construction outside and in currently to convert the hotel to a 5 star already gets 5 stars from us   The location was excellent for easy access to trains Metro and buses to all the best sites customer service was exceptional and staff was able to assist in English very well

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The old rooms are a bit too dark and creepy request for the new rooms to have the ultimate experience here these new rooms are well lit and bright for those who like a properly illuminated room space Also didn t like that the hotel outsourced kitchen services only breakfast is served in house lunch and dinner will be ordered by the hotel on your behalf externally   Location was great staff was great too great value for money and not to forget the room upgrade twice it was such a great gesture as we had complained our room was too dark the room was changed with an upgrade from deluxe to junior suite withou5t any fuss at all

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: We had a truly incredible and unforgettable stay in Paris at the Best Western Diamond Opera Hotel We were upgraded to the Diamond Suite the best room in the hotel at no extra cost which offered spectacular balcony views of the city spa facilities nespresso machine and a very large spacious room Contemporary sleek and luxurious interiors throughout and together with exceptional customer service helpful and polite staff made our stay as relaxing and comfortable as possible Outstanding attention to detail and final touches from the high tech touch screen climate control sauna spa lighting and music settings Japanese heated toilet to the delicious complementary macaroons Absolutely perfect location easily within walking distance to the top sites in Paris A stunning 5 holiday in pure luxury The best hotel we have ever stayed in will be highly recommending it

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Very good service A young lady names Christina sorry I can t recall assist us to reserve tables in tour d argent me and my wife have a wonderful birthday dinner thanks to her Everything is perfect

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Corridor too dark and narrow Can be a fire hazard   Excellent location room which they upgraded me was bright and clean with a smart TV Good wifi connection

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Breakfast was nice especially the croissants Although suggest getting up early as the cooked breakfast items were gone by 9 45 Apart from this we really enjoyed our stay here and would most definitely stay here again   Lovely decor throughout the hotel Lovely and clean shower was fab and the large bed was so comfortable Staff were all helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The bed and pillows were very comfortable The bathroom was clean and large enough especially with a separate toilet The staff were very helpful throughout our stay Overall our stay was good value for money

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: nothing it was perfect  gorgeous place to stay would highly recommend it staff was amazing and the hotel was the best i have ever stayed even put rose petals on are bed and gave us macoroons which made it extra special for my boyfriends birthday

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: There was construction being done at the location so a little loud at times Overall GREAT stay   The location was excellent the staff was helpful Rooms were very nice posh just a little small

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: We felt that the full breakfast is quite expensive per person but I think the express breakfast offers an excellent alternative for those travellers who are on the go We availed of this option the quality of this as well as the service was excellent   it was so kind of the hotel staff to upgrade our room as it was our Wedding Anniversary The treats left out for us in on our room on arrival was a very thoughtful gesture also The service was excellent particularly the reception and breakfast staff The express breakfast suited us perfectly and was really good value

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Nothing   The staff made this stay easy They held my bag all day after check out They upgraded me to a better room The room was great much better than the 5 star hotel I stayed in for the rest of my trip

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: recently refurbished but very poor quality lights in bathroom did not work no extractor fan for shower ventilation in room not working or does not go cool enough fridge not cold enough new lights in hallway hanging from wall and already out of order plus their rack rates were ridiculously expensive lucky we got a decent rate or we would not have booked   nice hotel and good prices good location friendly staff

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: I did find that the breakfast was a bit on the pricey side for what was included Therefore i opted not to include with my booking instead visited different cafes that are located outside of the hotel every morning which was alot cheaper   Absolutely loved staying in this hotel during my visit to Paris Literally no complaints whatsoever Fresh bedding on my super kingsize bed and nice smelling toiletries everyday The decor was beautiful which was a massive bonus aesthetically The hotel was central to all the major attractions i was interested in with the underground Metro just a few minutes walk from the hotel

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Supposed to be spa but that didn t exist that was the reason for selecting this hotel above others Not value for the price paid   Good location for metro access

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The courtyard or restaurant wasn t trading accessible during our stay which just means we ll have to return when it does   The decor the location and the staff was stunning perfect and super pleasant

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: All day room service should be available Couldn t see no bar as the hotel was getting refurbished and was not told when booked Door need to be solid and sound proof as we could hear everything  Bed was comfy

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Our room was next to the staircase The door to the staircase didn t have a silencer or slow shutting mechanism so kept on banging shut everytime someone went through it Made sleeping difficult we were woken up at about 5am by it Told staff about it in the morning 8am and they just asked if we had reported the problem to a member of staff Also 2 of our rooms on the 3rd floor had no WiFi

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The check in was a nightmare we were initially put into the wrong room and when we argued about the false promises of the website in regards to our suite the front desk told us there was no room of that description despite having the confirmation of Executive Suite in hand Also there was lots of noisy construction which disrupted our mornings No apologies were made as was no warning to said work Disappointing for the price we paid   Two staff members stood out in particular Nobel Fatou without them the start of our Paris vacation would have been very disappointing The chromotherapy shower was also divine Close to shops sights and transport which was handy

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Location is good there is close to Saint lazare and a marks and spencer food market There was just nothing pretty about the location no atmosphere with Parisian barrsaries etc   Good but not great Lovely hotel nicely decorated with an awesome rain shower Bed was comfy and strong air conditioning was a must and a God send during Paris heatwave

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Highly overpriced for what it offers Designer hotel but really not offering anything special Breakfast was ok but given the price I would have expected much better The room was very small and the air conditioning did not work Given outside was almost 30 degrees it resulted in a horrible experience   Good location easy to reach

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Housekeeping wasnt up to the mark Water glasses and tea cups in room were not replaced daily even if they were used   Location is fab Starbucks and Mark Spencer food is little same block as building Lots of bus stops close by lots of eateries too

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: The breakfast menu was repetitive and considering the price I paid should have been included there was a lot of noise due to building works but it stopped in the early evenings but in all it was a beautiful stay   My room was very nice the bed was comfortable the hospitality was very polite

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Work being carried out in the hotel meant very dusty in communal areas but staff did well to minimise disruption for guests Showers don t have curtain or screen so whole bathroom floor becomes a tray   Handy bar across the road for breakfast at 7euros per person Location of metro just across road Good size rooms

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Foyer hallways and stairs quite dark Given poor instructions on internet access we asked for help they said they would just be a minute fifteen minutes later still no assistance Then we found a free computer way around the corner why not offer us that in the mean time Breakfast way overpriced  Bed and room great Modern bathroom

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Wifi is limited to a set number of devices with no ability to remove devices  Very modern looks great with very good room facilities and very polite and accommodating staff Amazing location ideal for tourists

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: CAMERA IN THE BATHROOM See last sentences It seemed like our room had only recently been renovated The air con didn t seem to work at all and when I put my hand over the vent to check for air flow it fell off the wall and almost hit me in the head Upon inspection it was stuck to the wall with 2 sided tape The intercom handset in the bathroom was broken and almost falling apart There was a large dark rectangle in the lower half of the bathroom mirror which seemed to serve no purpose I thought it may be a monitor to display a clock and outside ambient temps that was currently not working When I enquired about it the receptionist told me it was a decoration I think this is unlikely Further inspection of the mirror showed that it wasn t even fastened to the wall properly the entire lower right corner was sitting away from the wall When my inquisitive eyes reached the top of the mirror I was surprised beyond belief to find what looked like haven t confirmed yet a pin hole camera It was a small object about 1 5mm width A cube shape with 1 side that was convex smooth and rounded 3 wires coming out of the cube extended down behind the mirror and into the wall It had been carefully fastened to the back of the mirror in the centre of the top edge with 2 sided tape The tape had been placed over the wires about 3cm from the camera and the camera had been angled so as to look directly into the space where anyone standing in front of the mirror would be When I enquired at reception they told me it s nothing Yes that s a quote I went back to the room and yanked the thing up as hard as I could and stuffed it all behind the mirror   This hotel was interesting with its mock diamonds inlaid into most of the furniture Almost everything else is made to sparkle too

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond

Hotel_Name: Maison Albar Hotel Paris Op ra Diamond
Full_Review: Hotel is currently being renovated as is the building next to it But actually sounds from the hotel renovation are the worst They wake you up from 8AM They are taking place at the courtyard which means you get drilling and all other noises right when you eat breakfast downstairs Oh and the breakfast That deserves whole another story Avoid it at all costs There are some good products there crepes and freshly baked buns but the stuff serving it is just a nightmare I had to ask every single day for either plates forks knives buns because NOBODY was checking if everything is present And I ve always received the worst coffee ever I mean after 15 20 minutes of waiting for it when they didn t forgot to add milk to it And it s from a Nespresso machine How can you ruin that   Location is perfect Rooms are very comfortable Cleaning service was superb But that s about it Very helpful stuff at reception

Full_Review: Everything was wonderful As I mentioned if you have more than two people in your party a larger room would be advisable   Amazing property in a great location For those in America used to the stereotypical view of a Best Western property the Best Western Premier properties are a complete 180 from what we re used to The hotel was modern clean incredibly well positioned and with a staff that was accommodating friendly and patient We had a deluxe room with a very comfortable bed this coming from someone with a Tempur Pedic at home and great modern bathroom The room was a little cramped for two people but frankly we only spent time there in the evenings to rest If you have more than two people I would suggest getting a larger room Overall I would gladly recommend and would stay again at this property There is also a taxi stand about a block away which made getting around easy in addition to a Marks and Spencer food hall on one side of the hotel and Starbucks around the corner there was always a place to grab a quick snack before heading out

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: There is a apparently disconnection between the reception and the concergerie service I travel around the world for bussiness purposes and in my trips I just say make my request one time I don t know if the disconnection was between booking and the hotel I don t think so because even the requests made directly on the phone were not performed as expected or not with the quality and profesionality that would be expected of the services promoted in the webs and advertisings of the hotel Normally I don t complaint and the high price of the services is not an issue for me if I get back a good service for what I m paying for Other misinformation was regarding the service offered by the hotel Meet and Greet it s promoted as a service offered to wait the customers at the airplain door or at least I understood like this Actually the person that received us was waiting for us at the baggage claim aerea We wouldn t get lost in this terminal in Paris It s not Schiphol airport or Frankfort but customer expect something special and even the person was very kind and attend the service is not as special as we expected Also in our trip back to the airport the driver dropped us at the wrong place and we had to walk a bit to find the right place to drop out luggages we were waiting that the driver would escort us till the check in area For a service that cost 290 and 160 there are taxis and other kind of transport services that for much less they perform better and more professional Summarizing Big prices for very normal services The room was good I would say better than normal For a luxury room it was not as good as I saw in my trips for rooms with the price this room had Again I m use to this kind of prices but it s too expensive I think the customer only pays for the location Excellency is something else and I didn t get this in my journey   Very well located hotel boutique hotel If you are familiar with the cold bussiness environment where people even don t look to you this is your hotel If you are looking for a warm hotel where you can feel the people forget it The staff is very nice good concergerie I would put more enphasys in the arrangement and quality of the activities that the concergies organice In my case through booking I made a couple of requests and they were not excellent as I expected for this kind of hotel examples bouquette of roses with an inscription as it was my wedding anniversary the roses were old and not very elegant and the inscription that I requested to put I with the flowers was forgotten Really a pity 2 we arranged a guide with the concergie to take us around in Paris with a chronological trip as said we needed a very simple but nice journey as it was the first time of my partner in Paris above the cost of the arrangement that was exaggerated I was expecting even a super special and well prepared person the trip was as I say correct let s leave it like this my knowledge of the city and historical background was I think better We repeated the tour with one of the guys that makes free tours and it was much much better and professional All the respect for the guide Sophie She was amazing as person but she didn t perform as well as we expected for the price 390

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Rooms too small even the deluxe Too pricey Only give water in evening at turn down service  Fab location Comfy beds Staff friendly Views onto central courtyard

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Fantastic location near the Louvre Terrific staff and concierge who recommended a fantastic cafe around the corner I would highly recommend the hotel and wish we could have stayed longer

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Value for money is extremely poor Breakfast is simple Mini bar prices are laughable Room is very very small  Location is very good Just a few steps away from Louvre and Metro

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Nothing  Everything especially the staff Staff were attentive and very helpful They were so kind as to upgrade us to the homeyroom suite Beautiful room

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The wait staff and room service although good could be improved   The staff is very friendly and very knowledgeable Front desk and concierge attentive and result oriented They made us feel very special

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The only thing we weren t that happy with and it s not really the hotel s fault is that the rooms the basic standard size are extremely small and there were few places to put our things We were packed for a two week trip and things were tight They did however provide us with a rolling rack on which to hang stuff so it ended up working out ok   The hotel is beautiful and located between the Louvre on one side and the Palais Royal on the other Even though we didn t visit the Louvre we found the location to be ideal for walking to different places We were originally going to stay in the Invalides area and are glad we decided not to The hotel was exceptionally clean and elegant yet not over the top Very tasteful The staff were so nice and accommodating and helped us with all of our questions A simply wonderful experience

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Perfect service and wonderful suggestions from the concierge Great breakfast We had a small but cosy and clean room with a relatively big bathroom Excellent location for going by feet and public transport Would definitely come back and fully recommend

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The staff and property were wonderful This is my favorite hotel in Paris Tasteful discreet intimate layered and very causal yet sophisticated I plan to be back in the Fall

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The one and only and very minor area for improvement would be the buffet breakfast which is quite limited for the price specially when it come to the selection of sliced fruit The room service breakfast I had was outstanding and the restaurant breakfast just didn t match the quality However do not let this stop you from studying at this exceptional hotel   Beautiful boutique hotel in an excellent location Walk to the Louvre and Tuileries gardens and the shops on Rue st Honore The room is a decent size given that it s Paris but is charming and tasteful The bed linen was lovely and the bed was very comfortable As requested I was given a quiet room on the 6th floor which had a small balcony and lovely views plus a bath tub The room had a kettle for making tea which was a welcome addition as many hotels are doing away with this facility All of the staff including the Concierge are friendly welcoming helpful and genuinely go out of the way the can to do anything for you An incredible team of well trained staff who really set this hotel apart by making you feel truly cared for I ate twice in the hotel bar where the staff are true mixologists making exceptional cocktails and I ate what was without exception the best crouque Monsieur I ve ever had You must try it A parting gift of a beautiful book just topped off an incredible stay at a very special hotel that I cannot wait to revisit

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The shower drain clogged up Can hear other room doors slamming closed   Very comfortable bed great location next to the louvre balcony friendliest staff made us feel at home and very comfortable

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: I would rather say that the cost of the breakfast was too high considering all the other possibilities to enjoy and explore that Paris can offer   the location of the hotel is exceptional very friendly and available staff Extremely comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The rooms are small we had a deluxe double which I believe is their equivalent of a standard but you can live with that because of all of the above Drinks and food in the hotel are pricey but you re not obliged to dine or drink there These aren t really negatives for us as the hotel is so close to restaurants and bars   The service was excellent as well as the location Our room 412 had a gorgeous view over a courtyard The hotel staff placed macaroons and madelines in the room when we got there The beds are really comfortable and I know I ve said it before but genuinely the loveliest staff from the cleaners the bar tender to reception and concierge Cannot fault this beautiful hotel The hotel is a stones throw away from the Louvre and various other places such as Rue St Honore for restaurants and Rue de Rivoli for shopping Notre Dame is also not too far We had a lovely cocktail in the hotel bar served by a lovely and talented bar tender The hotel decor is clean and elegant

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The mattress not comfortable the bed sheets when we cheched in was not clean Since there was no coffee machine in the room we asked for water kettle and the staff said its too hard to find one after talking to the manager   The staff

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: No complaints whatever We plan to go back and stay longer on our next visit   First of all the staff were incredibly helpful and polite The bar was great and our room was clean and a quick walk to many places in Paris It is a more modern contemporary looking hotel definitely luxurious

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Breakfast choice was slightly limited and a little disappointing  The staff went above and beyond to help and were so friendly They made a special birthday cocktail for my 8 year old daughter for her birthday

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The room was extraordinary small and sometimes things like boiled eggs to be extra in breakfast buffet is a little annoying Also for people that have allergic problems the restaurant kitchen is not so flexible and some of the foods came as partly prepared rather than freshelly cooked in cafe and restaurant sections   The cleanliness of the hotel was quiet good and the staff was good enough for an standard 5 star boutique hotel

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: breakfast is overpriced room size is a bit tight though understandable for the Paris centre location  very friendly staff great location and cozy atmosphere excellent service and small but touching gestures of appreciation for the loyalty as I was staying in this hotel before as well

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The hotel was not the one I expected The size of the room was too small it lacked a tea coffee machine which is the norm in all 5 star hotels It didnt have a stand where one should put luggage Not enough space in the wardrobe and access is limited the fitness center about which there is a long list in booking com description is a 10 m2 space with four pieces of equipment This is a small boutique hotel not the Grand Hotel of Royals as the name suggests and exxagerated marketing works the other way once you are there   The staff were helpfull

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: the room is too small they kept it tidy but not as clean as a 5 star hotel should be bathroom corners doors and walls were dirty   comfy bed great breakfast and very nice staff

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: there wasn t anything I didn t like  The staff at the hotel were incredible the concierge had tickets to many museums They recommended restaurants to eat at that were all fantastic

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Nothing  Everything about this hotel was wonderful I have never stayed in such a lovely hotel The building itself was beautiful The room was lovely with two large windows The shower was the best hotel shower I have experienced They had an evening turn down service which was amazing Breakfast was delicious with an amazing selection of food The bed was very very comfortable The staff could not do enough for you and were very attentive

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: We had a very enjoyable and comfortable 3 nights stay Location can t be any better with easy walking distance to great attractions restaurants metro etc Yet the property is very discreet once you step in you find yourself whisked away from the crowds and noise I would say it s a good and fair SLH hotel it totally met our expectations Interesting pre dinner cocktails good facilities Carita SPA though no swimming pool friendly and professional staff very clean and generally well maintained property

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The staff were fantastic Unfortunately I was sick during my stay and they arranged for me to see a doctor and organized the taxi They were very caring and made me feel calm when I wasn t well The hotel is in an ideal location to explore some of the best sights of Paris The facilities were great and the decor is lovely I will absolutely stay here the next time I m in the city I can t praise the staff enough They were extremely friendly and professional

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Really impressed by all aspects Difficult to fault in any respect   The staff were excellent and nothing was too much trouble They could not have been more helpful and family friendly This is beautiful little hotel in a great central location but is situated in a quiet side street Facilities were great and everything was clean and very well maintained Strongly recommend a stay here

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Excellent hotel every detail handled with care and taste Classy and luxurious but comfortable and friendly Excellent location steps from the Louvre Fantastic breakfast Staff is extremely helpful and cordial Excellent spa facility Wonderful hotel and I would return there next time I m in Paris

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: When we had an issue with our room the guest manager Mathilde sorted out straight away and was brilliant Hotel is in a fabulous location and our accommodation was excellent

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Nothing  Location was perfect Breakfast was good Staff very very helpful I was in Paris to celebrate my wife s birthday The hotel gave us a nice gift and also gave us complimentary drink vouchers at the hotel bar They also helped us in making restaurant reservations All in all we really liked the place and the staff

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: I can t think of anything that I didn t like about the hotel   We loved the location of the hotel and its beautiful and clean rooms real paintings in the rooms Rooms are smallish but do not feel cramped because of thoughtful layout Very comfy beds We broke up our stay and stayed both at the street side and the courtyard side rooms and both were very quiet It is probably worth the money to book a delux room We found hotel staff to be very professional courteous and friendly The breakfast is limited in selection but more than adequate

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Room was very small even for Parisian standards as well beds were smaller than average it seems  Location staff amazing quality of hotel furnishings beautiful hotel

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: We did have an unpleasant experience when on the second day wanted to try the breakfast buffet A waiter did not allow us to seat in the closest area to the buffet wrongly saying they were booked the reason our skin and race The manager apologized We left the buffet without trying and did not wish to eat there anymore Another comment is about the trash canes not having a plastic bag inside specially the one in the bathroom not hygienic for the personal and the things she or he touches in the room this is something a five star hotel should not save money for   We just used the room did not eat there

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: I d like to have some Milk with my Nespresso Coffee from the fantastic Coffee Machine on the sideboard Long Life Milk in small packs would be kind a lot of them please  Bed is 7th Heaven Bathroom is 8th Balcony for Smokers with table is 9th heaven the Lulli Bar is 10th AND the Manager ANGEL Mr GERMAIN is 11th Heaven is friendly as a Gentleman can be and kind as a DOG and HELPFUL as a SAMARITAN If you ever run into a problem you can turn to anyone there BUT Mr GERMAIN has the 7 Service for you great Guy and brilliant

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: More wardrobe space but that is being picky   Parisians have a reputation for being unfriendly and snobbish Not so at this hotel where you are made welcome from the minute you set foot in the lobby to the minute you leave And it is or at least seems genuine The hotel is so close to the Louvre you can almost smell the chestnuts roasting in the courtyard Anouck a gem of a concierge my teenage daughters are fans sliced through French beaurocracy to serve up queue free tickets at all the main spots the private tour up the Eiffel Tower is unmissable as we only had two days to zoom around everything She also provided us with an insider s guide to restaurants so we didn t have to rely on the usual search engines and end up disappointed I haven t been to Paris for 30 years and thanks to this place may not leave it so long next time

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Staff was helpful but if more than one or two people needed assistance the wait was a little long   This hotel is truly beautiful The beds were so comfortable and the toiletries were luxurious It was a little pricey but I would stay here again in a heart beat The location was close enough to everything without being right on top of it

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Unacceptable service and inconsiderate staff  I arrived there at 4pm when they decided that my room was no longer booked and they bumped me in favor of another client I had no prior warning or email from their Mangement Someone on the reception was just trying to figure out which other hotel in paris to move me to even though I was in town for work for less than 24 hours Extremely unprofessional It s only after I became extremely agitated that they actually gave me my room which implies that there was no need for this whole story or added stress Or they did that stunt to the next client who decided to check in Just unacceptable

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The hotel is located right beside the Palace Royale and the Louvre The rooms were excellent and had a lovely view of the courtyard The concierge desk went above and beyond to help me plan a very special occasion for myself and my fianc Special mention to Baptiste thanks again for all your help

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: room facility could be improved no coffee machine or tea maker in the room  Location and staff very nice little hotel in centre of paris good value will stay again

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Very friendly and helpful service Loved the View Enjoyed the workout room the tea and fruit offered and the Hamaam Boutique hotel like a art museum Fits perfectly with the area

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The rooms are very nice but small we stayed at 615 of which dressing area bathroom and toilet are of sufficient space but the room itself is simply to small  Very impressed by the staff of this beautiful hotel Whatever they could do they did to make our stay even more comfortable We felt at home

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The room was quite small but nice The concierge was not informed about vital information important to travelers We were taking a day trip to Versailles and inquired where to catch the train We had tickets for a tour so our time was limited when we got to the recommended train station it was closed for construction as was the entire train line We stopped a Taxi and asked where to catch a train but he didn t know so we paid him to drive us to Versailles So disappointing and when we told the concierge she was surprised but didn t offer to do anything for us

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Couldn t fault the staff extremely helpfull and the congierge was amazing Great location opposite the Louvre food was excellent both for breakfast and dinner

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: This is not 5 stars hotel The room was small For me iron is the main room equipment No coffee tea facilities in room   Location Very very friendly staff

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: No complaints   Beautiful hotel with exceptional accommodations The staff was warm friendly and very helpful The concierge Antione advised and took care of all our tour planning while in Paris The location is perfect The Louvre is across the street We will be back

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The air conditioning struggled with the high temperatures and our children s suite shower drain smelt at times   Wonderful location and superbly attentive staff sincere and very helpful Great service Rooms rather small but well appointed and very clean

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Everything was superb   Excellent service throughout our stay from the first moment and up until departure with staff kindly offering water bottles to take with us for the ride to the airport We loved hamam and tees and refreshments provided at the spa area Our suite was great too very comfortable for 3 people

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Nothing really   The most amazing hotel stay in my life Our honeymoon plan went disastrously wrong as we initially planned to go to Nice via Istanbul when tragic events hit both cities As an alternative we chose to stay in Paris and we were somewhat disappointed with the last minute changes in our honeymoon plan But these guys at the Grand Hotel du Palais Royal pulled out a magic and lifted our honeymoon spirit up from the rock bottom I know honeymoon room upgrades cannot be generalized to all visitors but still the service and the rooms were just amazing and the pleasant surprise with an upgrade to the Panoramic Suite for the last night left us speechless and put the icing on the cake I will definitely stay at this hotel again for my future visits to Paris

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The staff were very friendly and helpful The rooms were clean and the beds comfortable The conceirge was very very friendly and helpful The hotel is in a good location close to The Louvre Overall great experience

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Location is very central but in secluded location We had an upgrade to a lovely junior suite Decor of hotel is lovely Staff very helpful and pleasant

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Our junior suite was very modestly sized even by Parisian standards   The staff were extremely attentive and very helpful Location was a 5 minute walk to the Louvre

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The bathroom was small  The hotel has a boutique feel and is in a fantastic location It is close to the metro and barely a block from the Louvre Most of the other major museums attractions like the D Orsay Pompidou Tulleries St Germain are a short walk The staff is very professional and the property is well maintained I would not hesitate to stay here again

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: No complaints  It was so conveniently located in the heart of Paris but the best thing was its staff which is extremely friendly To get such service and smile in an otherwise arrogant Paris makes such a difference They take care of small details Loved restaurant recommendations

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The very obliging staff Always ready with helpful advise despite our lack of French Arranged our tours etc effortlessly and most importantly always with a smile The decor was absolutely beautiful No frills just classically chic You left us with a very memorable Paris experience Thank you

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Breakfast was a little disappointing and service was slow Drinks at the bar were pricey   Location was excellent Spa was very good and reception and concierge staff were extremely good

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Our only disappointment is that we had to leave   Absolutely the most charming hotel with the most attentive and intuitive staff in the most wonderful location

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Room was a little small Massage was a little bit expensive but quality was great   Service was excellent especially the front desk and concierge Spa was great Location was also great

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The shower was a bit tricky if you re tall   Beautiful hotel quiet room overlooking an elegant square Very central Wonderful friendly and helpful staff delicious buffet breakfast

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The room was the size of the bed I was shocked the minute I enter the room and Bath room was very small This is not Five Star I have paid less for better Hotels in Paris Actually I book my return in another hotel Bigger room Had Little Kitchen Beautiful bathroom with less price with Balcony Same location Actually Better location The Lounge Drink was included The price for breakfast less and Better breakfast   It was Clean but Over priced

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Not a thing A great hotel   Lovely boutique hotel perfectly located near the Louvre in Paris Beautiful comfortable and exceptional staff attentive helpful kind A fantastic find in Paris I will go back again and again

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Not getting a card the second night to tell me about the weather   All the staff were charming We were also given small cakes in our room on the first night together with a card telling us what the weather would be like the next day so that we could plan our day

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The staff was particularly thoughtful they payed special attention to my husbands birthday Tasteful interieur beautiful nicely renovated hotel Excellent location

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: According to my previous experience the level of service in France is quite low but this hotel is an exception The staff is very friendly and eager to help Location of the hotel is wonderful Rooms are nice and cozy I would recommend this hotel and for sure when I am in Paris I ll stay in Grand Hotel du Palais Royal again Thank you for our amazing weekend in Paris

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Staff was a little judge mental when I could not locate my computer I checked in with it but did not check out with it It was upsetting   I love the location the rooms and all the amenities

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Upon checking in it was very cold as the reception area is facing to the outside the outside temperature at that time was almost 0 degree Used the Turkish bath downstairs and the facility is for both men and women showers also I was feeling uncomfortable to hear men s talking just outside the sauna room since I was alone with only a bath towel wrapped around myself Although the change rooms are separated for men and women there is no separate wall between the rooms so when you just step out from the lady s room or a shower booth you may see unknown men just in front of you   The room was very quiet it was great to recover from a long flight Nice welcome sweets and a bottle of Evian in the room Staff are very friendly and professional The room bed linen and towels were always very clean

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: everything from the location to the kind staff to the facility there is a hanmam that we used almost everyday to the amazing breakfast I am so happy to have found my go to hotel in Paris

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: beautifull hotel and fantastic location the room was great the bed was so comfortable i didn t want to get up the staff were so friendly and the concierge would do anything for us will comeback for sure oh and nice cocktails

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: No complaints actually   Location was excellent only a few blocks from the Louvre Best location we have stayed in in Paris far better than off Champs Elys es for example Rooms were beautiful and very well appointed and staff was wonderful

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The staff at the hotel were some of the most professional and helpful i have come across in a hotel Nothing was too much trouble for them to make our stay as comfortable as possible and the reccomendations that the hotel concierge made were excellent The hotel is in a great location being a stones throw away from the Lourve and nearby to some nearby cafes and bars We had a superior rom and the facilities were very good The shower was great with a large monsoon shower head as well as an additional detachable shower for me the bed and the shower can make or break a hotel The bed was very comfortable and the hotel was very peaceful so we slept very well both nights Also really good to see a full length mirror in the room

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Breakfast too expensive Lots of choice locally so we explored and ate outside  The hotel is marvellous Everything we could have wished for Friendly helpful staff and incredibly quiet for a very central location Good cocktail bar Very helpful concierge for eating out and explorations

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The only slight disappointment was breakfast it was so so little choice and one had to wait up to 10 minutes for coffee to be served  Location decoration room we were upgraded very helpful and kind staff especially the concierge

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The location of the hotel was perfect I had informed the hotel that the reason for our trip was my daughter s birthday The staff were very friendly and gave us not just one but two up grades to a Junior suite which had beautiful views over the roof tops of Paris As a luxurious hotel it had a very welcoming and relaxed atmosphere I would recommend it to anyone

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The bar area could be better utilised   The staff were very good Thank you to Fred for driving us and to the maitre De for the restaurant recommendations We went to Le Metciere and was a great tip Thanks Rooms were lovely as was the spa Breakfast was great

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Small chic hotel ideally located near the Louvre The staff were attentive ensuring we were comfortable throughout our stay The concierge service was seamless Can t wait to come back

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Perfecty located boitique quit hotel just 2 min walk from Louwre and other attractions Excelent service super concierge service Definitevly will be back

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: no coffee tea facilities in room extra charges for eggs except scrambled with breakfast buffet small bed the interior was nice but did not feel 5   staff location

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: The concierge Head Antoine and his staff have been awesome Very quite street in the heart of Paris Spectacular view of the Louvre and Tour Eiffel Delicious breakfast

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: You needed to be about 7ft tall to reach the shelves in the wardrobe   A lovely boutique hotel located in the heart of Paris The staff were really friendly and the room was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: We checked in later afternoon on the day and we just simply wanted to sleep Housekeeping tried to come in but cannot as I had locked the door The house keeping was so insisted they called in and ask if we need any service Guess we would call if we need any help   Just the right proportion in all aspects The hotel is big enough to equip with everything but not too big so crowded with too many guests Breakfast is excellent Just appropriate Will not waste unnecessary food Everything well thoughts and achieved an excellent balance

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: Gift from the hotel and bath accessories are very chip no natural flowers in hotel and room no choice in mini bar  We got a better room Food was perfect

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: the staff were extremely friendly and helpful they have attended every need and request i had and went the extra mile every time the hotel was super clean and comfortable the WiFi was excellent just simply an amazing experience

Hotel_Name: Grand H tel Du Palais Royal
Full_Review: the staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming they could not do enough to help us including complimentary welcoming drinks and macarons for the children breakfast was spectacular with a huge choice of fresh everything toiletries were beautiful with Little Prince especially for the kids

Full_Review: The hotel is in an amazing location the design and interior of the hotel are luxe and glamorous and the staff and service are par excellence We will definitely be staying here again
